rationale: Both reviews identify the exact same single naming issue (mapValue + lemmas in the Bialgebra section) and propose incompatible renames; neither has any other findings. mapValue was deliberately chosen (see docstring and usage) for the 'functoriality in the value algebra' concept; whether compRight, map, postcomp, etc. is preferable is a matter of contested style preference with no clear maintainer-mandated winner, so acting on either leaves an essentially equivalent final PR.
